name: AVA
description: Fast test runner for Node.js that runs tests concurrently, embraces async, and has zero magical globals with first-class TypeScript support.

seo.title: AVA — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: AVA: Fast test runner for Node.js that runs tests concurrently, embraces async, and has zero magical globals with first-class TypeScript support.

when_to_use: Concurrent async test execution for Node.js services
TypeScript-first unit tests with minimal configuration
Isolated test processes eliminating global state leaks
Fast test feedback with no hidden magic globals

pros: Runs test files concurrently by default, very fast
No globals, each file is a plain module
Minimal magic, failures point to real lines quickly
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Jest or Vitest
Limited built-in mocking, relies on third-party libs
Snapshot and coverage tooling lag competitors
review.verdict: A lean, fast Node test runner for folks who find Jest too opinionated and heavy.
review.best_for: Node library authors wanting parallel, dependency-light, ESM-native tests
review.not_for: Frontend apps needing jsdom, mocks and snapshots bundled in one runner
